pushed_trigger.note: .github/selfheal_trigger.txt was created and pushed to main to trigger push-based workflows.

recent_analysis.logs_error: HTTP 404 when requesting logs archive; jobs array empty
recent_analysis.root_cause_class: GitHub Actions の内部エラー
recent_analysis.root_cause_explanation: Workflow run exists for main, but job list is empty and logs archive returns 404. This indicates job-level execution or logs availability is missing on GitHub Actions side (not a YAML/test artifact).
recent_analysis.suggested_minimal_patch: Retry run via push or manual dispatch; if persistent, escalate to GitHub Support. Consider running a short diagnostic job on a branch first.
